name: Firsthand Technology Value Fund, Inc.
business: Firsthand Technology Value Fund (SVVC) is an externally managed, closed-end, non-diversified management investment company that has elected to be treated as a business development company (BDC). Its investment objective is to seek long-term growth of capital by investing primarily in equity and equity-related securities of technology and cleantech companies. The fund invests at least 80% of its assets in technology companies and at least 70% of its assets in privately held companies and public companies with market capitalizations less than $250 million.
sellsTo: Investors seeking long-term capital growth through venture capital and private equity investments

exposures.sentence: IntraOp Medical Corp. manufactures and markets the Mobetron, a medical device for delivering Intra Operative Electron Radiation Therapy to cancer patients.
Lyncean Technologies, Inc. is a developer of X-ray and extreme ultraviolet (EUV) light sources for laboratory and commercial use.
Revasum designs CMP and grinding technology for the semiconductor equipment industry.
UCT Coatings, Inc. is a leader in the development of metal coatings that reduce friction and improve efficiency in mechanical systems.
Wrightspeed, Inc. is a supplier of electric drivetrains for heavy-duty commercial vehicles.
